Winona is a sheep. Tallinn is in Estonia. The bike is small. Eve forgot to lock the door. The length of Emajogi is 80 kilometers. The big mouse is strong. The rain continued. The man carrying a bag waved. The road leading to the village was narrow. Agatha is in trouble. Is the homework unfinished?
